description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate

You close the distance with terrifying speed and crash into your prey. Stride up to your Speed (this Stride does not trigger reactions), then make a Strike. If the Strike hits:

  • Add 2d6 extra damage.
  • Attempt to Trip the target as a free action (use your Athletics modifier). On a success, the target is knocked prone.

If you are in Hybrid Form or Full Wolf Form when you use this ability, your Stride distance for this action increases by 10 feet.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
